commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Annual Budget tool (1-year P&L with monthly breakdown)

- Sales forecast, direct costs, overheads by category
- Monthly P&L table with FY totals and % of revenue
- KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Profit, Overheads, EBITDA
- 4 charts: Revenue vs Costs, Monthly EBITDA, Overhead breakdown, Cumulative EBITDA
- Excel template download + upload
- PDF export with branded report

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix startup timeout: skip torch install when HF_API_TOKEN is set

torch + sentence-transformers take 7+ min to install, exceeding Azure's
230s container start limit on fresh instances. When HF_API_TOKEN is set
the app uses the remote HF Inference API and never loads a local model,
so the torch install is completely unnecessary.

Core deps (fastapi, duckdb, openpyxl, etc.) still install on first boot
and take only ~30s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: hovered game card renders above neighbors, reduce scale (#153)

* fix: hovered game card renders above neighbors, reduce scale effect

The FLIP animation hook applied inline zIndex: 1 to all stable cards,
which overrode Tailwind's hover:z-10 class (inline styles always beat
CSS classes). This caused hovered cards to render behind later DOM
siblings instead of on top.

Remove inline zIndex from stable/entering FLIP styles so the CSS hover
class controls stacking. Also reduce the hover scale from 1.25 to 1.15
for a subtler effect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add chromatic for visual regression testing

commit.message:
Remove fork bomb deny rule that breaks settings parser

The :(){ :|:& };: pattern contains empty parens that the
permission parser interprets as a malformed Bash() rule,
causing the entire settings file to be skipped.

commit.message:
fix: guard save_registry against accidental production overwrites

Adds a repo-count sanity check when writing to the default production
registry path. If the data contains fewer than 50 repos (production has
100+), raises ValueError instead of silently clobbering the file.

Explicit paths bypass the guard, so tests and scripts writing to
temp files are unaffected.

Includes 3 new tests verifying the guard behavior.

commit.message:
youtube: add PO token support via bgutil container + plugin

PO (Proof of Origin) tokens make yt-dlp requests look like a real
browser to YouTube, reducing ban risk when using cookies.

- configuration.nix: bgutil-pot Docker container on localhost:4416
  (generates tokens via BotGuard, lightweight, always running)
- youtube-download.nix: wrapped yt-dlp with bgutil plugin loaded
  via --plugin-dirs, plugin auto-discovers the HTTP token server

fix: populate %*ENV at startup, add .package method, PROCESS:: stash (#800)

* fix: populate %*ENV at startup, add .package method, PROCESS:: stash

- Initialize %*ENV with all OS environment variables at interpreter
  startup so %*ENV.keys, %*ENV.elems, and copying work correctly
- Sync %*ENV changes to OS environment (set_var/remove_var) so child
  processes see updated values

  package as a Package value

* fix: guard std::env calls with cfg(not(target_family = "wasm"))

std::env::vars(), set_var, and remove_var are not available on WASM
targets and cause panics. Guard all these calls with cfg attributes
to only run on native targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revise Hamilton filter and polynomial trend methods

Hamilton filter:
- Estimation window changed to Jan 2010 – Feb 2020 (matching trend method)
- No more recursive counterfactual post-COVID; implied path now uses actual
  lagged values (y[t-24..t-27]) at every date, pre- and post-COVID alike
- Residual = actual minus direct OLS prediction using real lags

Polynomial trend:
- Starts at degree 3 and drops the highest-degree term if its two-tailed
  p-value exceeds 0.05, re-estimating down to degree 1 (linear minimum)
- Estimation window unchanged: Jan 2010 – Feb 2020
- Trend line extrapolated forward from Jan 2010 onwards

commit.message:
Fix 14 bugs in Courses & Programs admin sections

Courses (courses/page.tsx):
- Fix slug auto-generation freezing after first character typed
- Fix handleEdit swallowing API error details
- Fix Cancel button not resetting selectedCourse state
- Add slug uniqueness validation (frontend check)

Course Editor (courses/[id]/edit/page.tsx):
- Fix stale closure in video upload handler (use functional setState)
- Fix image upload only updating primary content (now updates secondary too)
- Optimize drag-and-drop to only PATCH lessons with changed sort_order
- Fix module toggle icon showing same direction in both states

Programs (programs/page.tsx):
- Fix handleSubmit swallowing error details from API response
- Fix toggleActive sending incomplete PUT (now includes name field)
- Add confirmation dialog before copyWeek overwrites all weeks
- Fix useCallback dependencies (add locale for toast messages)
- Fix descTab defaulting to 'secondary' instead of 'primary'
- Add slug uniqueness validation (frontend check)

API (api/courses/route.ts):
- Fix price=0 impossible (0 was falsy, defaulting to 99)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Activity box with Find Friends CTA, medium blue month balance

- Month balance box: changed from dark navy (#213B75) to medium blue (#4C7FC4)
- Removed Activity box (green card) and entire dark green section
- Added full-width dark blue (#213B75) "Find friends to lend with" CTA box with centered message and two buttons: Search for Friends (white) and Invite Friends (white/20)
- Invite Friends uses Web Share API with clipboard fallback
- Removed unused RecentActivity import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mastering crash, auth errors, and missing table queries

- ai-features.js: Fix TypeError at line 1444 — aiProfile.issues contains
  objects {type,description}, not strings. Now checks typeof before indexOf.
- supabase-client.js: getUserSubscription() was querying non-existent
  user_profiles table — rewritten to use purchases + subscriptions tables.
- supabase-client.js: loadAndDisplayCredits() now sends Bearer auth token
  (was getting 401 without it).
- stripe-client.js: getUserHighestTier() made resilient — tries purchases
  then subscriptions, catches table-not-found errors gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: enforce per-role MCP tool filtering server-side

Agents now receive FILAMENT_AGENT_ROLE via env var in MCP config.
The MCP server checks each tool call against the role's whitelist,
returning an error for disallowed tools. Role tool names updated
to match actual MCP tool names (filament_* prefix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OOM crash during sync on memory-constrained devices

Callsign whitespace repair loaded all QSOs into memory with no predicate
or fetchLimit, then built a second in-memory dictionary — causing OOM on
devices with limited RAM (iPhone 11, 4GB). Now uses a targeted predicate
(callsign.contains(" ")) and processes in batches of 200 with per-batch
saves. Also replaces fatalError in mergeFetchedGroup with a thrown error.

Crash #451 (TestFlight, iPhone 11, iOS 26.3)

Full Next.js to Astro migration: 170 pages from 58 new files

Port all content, data, and pages from the Next.js production site into
the Astro template. Includes 16 data/type files, 15 reusable components,
7 page templates, 7 static pages, 8 dynamic route files generating ~134
location pages and 16 situation pages, plus config/polish updates.

- Phase 0: Copy types, county data (5 counties), situations (12), problem
  hubs, brand info, URL helpers; add @/* tsconfig path alias
- Phase 1: Convert React components to Astro (Breadcrumbs, CalloutBox,
  ShortAnswerBlock, StepTimeline, CountyCards, FAQAccordion, etc.)
- Phase 2: Create page templates (PageShell, StateHub, LocationHub,
  Neighborhood, Situation, ProblemHub, BrandPage)
- Phase 3: Static pages (about-us, contact, how-it-works, faq, reviews,
  privacy, terms)
- Phase 4: Dynamic location pages with getStaticPaths (MO/KS states,
  counties, cities, neighborhoods)
- Phase 5: Situation hub + 12 situation pages, probate + tax-delinquent
- Phase 6: 404 page, OG meta tags, footer links, situation card hrefs,
  global.css styles, astro.config (site, trailingSlash, sitemap)

commit.message:
Fix findings.html extraction — reporter response precedes node_enter in log

LangGraph callbacks fire synchronously during node execution, but cli.py
writes node_enter when the stream yields (after the node finishes). So the
reporter's llm_response appears BEFORE node_enter:reporter in the NDJSON.

The old extractor looked for llm_response events after node_enter:reporter
and found nothing. Fix: the reporter is always the last LLM call, so just
take the last llm_response in the log.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Filter out resolved markets from rewards data

Markets with price at 0/1 or with a winner token are effectively

server-side before serving to clients.
